query: fix the race condition in the inventory update

fragments.content:
def decrement_stock(product_id, qty):
    product = Product.query.get(product_id)
    product.stock -= qty
    db.session.commit()

from sqlalchemy import select, update
from sqlalchemy.orm import with_for_update
def atomic_decrement(product_id, qty):
    stmt = update(Product).where(Product.id == product_id).values(stock=Product.stock - qty)
    db.session.execute(stmt)

class Product(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    stock = db.Column(db.Integer, default=0)
    price = db.Column(db.Float)

fragments.content:
def get_page(items, page, per_page):
    start = page * per_page
    end = start + per_page
    return items[start:end]

def total_pages(total_items, per_page):
    return total_items // per_page

def test_pagination():
    items = list(range(25))
    page1 = get_page(items, 1, 10)
    assert len(page1) == 10
    assert page1[0] == 10

query: add Prometheus metrics for request latency and error rates

fragments.content:
from prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram, generate_latest
REQUEST_COUNT = Counter("http_requests_total", "Total requests", ["method", "endpoint", "status"])
REQUEST_LATENCY = Histogram("http_request_duration_seconds", "Request latency", ["endpoint"])

import time
def metrics_middleware(get_response):
    def middleware(request):
        start = time.time()
        response = get_response(request)
        duration = time.time() - start
        REQUEST_LATENCY.labels(request.path).observe(duration)
        return response
    return middleware
APP_VERSION = "2.1.0"

query: implement graceful shutdown for the worker process

fragments.content:
import signal
import sys
def handle_shutdown(signum, frame):
    print("Shutting down...")
    cleanup()
    sys.exit(0)
signal.signal(signal.SIGTERM, handle_shutdown)
signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, handle_shutdown)

def cleanup():
    db.session.close()
    redis_client.close()
    logger.info("Cleanup complete")
VERSION = "1.0"

import html
def sanitize_input(text):
    text = html.escape(text)
    text = text.replace(";", "")
    text = text.replace("--", "")
    return text[:200]
